subTitle: Jon and Sansa gather troops, while Olenna Tyrell plans to leave King's Landing. Later, Theon and Yara plan a destination.

subTitle: Brienne arrives at Riverrun, while Jaime meets with Edmure Tully. Later, Sandor Clegane hunts for revenge and Tyrion faces the consequences of earlier decisions.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda is pregnant after spending a single night with Steve. Furthermore, after she tells her friends of her intention to abort, Charlotte walks out envious and disgusted.

subTitle: Aidan proposes they buy Carrie's apartment together. Later, she finds a ring among his belongings and accidentally insults Miranda, who helped pick it out.

subTitle: Carrie finds living together with Aidan cramps their space. Meanwhile, Trey is ready to get on with life without a baby.

subTitle: The girls spend a night at the club Trade, dancing in a sea of attractive men. Additionally, Carrie meets Australian shoe importer Oliver Spencer, much to Stanford's envy.

subTitle: In order to get over her divorce, Charlotte takes up tap-dancing classes. However, it does not solve her emotional state.

subTitle: Carrie has an opportunity to buy her apartment. Meanwhile, Miranda calculates the exact amount she wasted on her shoe obsession.
